prompt: Use foaf.sk to map the corporate network around PARA INVEST s.r.o. (ICO 44424418). This company has 863K EUR in CRZ contracts. Do a deep investigation — trace all persons to their other companies and build the person-to-company matrix. Check if any related companies also appear in CRZ.

assertions.name: navigates_foaf
assertions.text: Navigates to foaf.sk with ICO 44424418 or searches for PARA INVEST

assertions.name: extracts_persons
assertions.text: Extracts at least one person with their role (konatel/spolocnik/etc) from the company page

assertions.name: traces_persons
assertions.text: For persons with 2+ companies, clicks through to find their other companies

assertions.name: builds_matrix
assertions.text: Builds a person-to-company matrix showing roles across multiple companies

assertions.name: crz_cross_reference
assertions.text: Runs SQL against CRZ database to check if related companies also have government contracts

assertions.name: reports_zlte_stopy
assertions.text: Reports zlte stopy section with severity levels (DANGER/WARNING)
